scripts.cap:ios: npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npx cap sync android && npx cap open android

notes.gemini-key: Set GEMINI_API_KEY in Vercel dashboard (free at aistudio.google.com)
notes.revenuecat: Set RC_API_KEY constant in index.html after creating product in RevenueCat + App Store Connect
notes.cap-setup: Run: npx cap add ios  (requires Mac + Xcode 15+)
